## Phase 1: Plan

**Monday (Industry Insight)** — Water infrastructure spending in WA/AU. Angle: more bores being drilled = more demand for reliable fluid supply. Reference the Blick fluid range generally.
- Target: 120-160 words
- Hook: Start with a ground-level observation drillers will recognise
- CTA: Ask what crews are seeing in their region

**Wednesday (Educational)** — Why water quality matters before you even open a bag of bentonite. Soda Ash + water conditioning is the step most crews
